items.definition_en: Water is a clear liquid that we drink.
items.example_en: I drink a glass of water every morning.

items.definition_en: Juice is a drink made from fruit or vegetables.
items.example_en: He always has orange juice for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Tea is a hot drink made from dried leaves.
items.example_en: She likes to drink tea in the afternoon.

items.definition_en: Coffee is a popular hot drink made with beans.
Milk is a white liquid from cows or other animals.
items.example_en: I add milk to my cereal every day.

items.definition_en: Soda is a sweet and fizzy drink.
items.example_en: Soda is served at many parties.

items.definition_en: Lemonade is a drink made from lemons, water, and sugar.
items.example_en: The children made lemonade to sell on a hot day.

items.definition_en: Hot chocolate is a warm drink made with milk and cocoa.
items.example_en: Hot chocolate is my favorite drink in winter.

items.definition_en: A smoothie is a thick drink made from blended fruit.
items.example_en: She prepares a smoothie for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Wine is an alcoholic drink made from grapes.
items.example_en: They enjoyed a glass of wine with dinner.

items.definition_en: Beer is a popular alcoholic drink made from grains.
items.example_en: My friends ordered beer at the bar.

items.definition_en: An energy drink is a drink that gives you more energy.
items.example_en: Some people drink an energy drink before working out.

items.definition_en: A milkshake is a cold, sweet drink made with milk and ice cream.
items.example_en: He ordered a chocolate milkshake with his burger.

items.definition_en: Sparkling water is water with bubbles in it.
items.example_en: She prefers sparkling water to still water.

items.definition_en: Cider is a drink made from apples, sometimes with alcohol.
items.example_en: We drank cold cider at the picnic.

items.definition_en: A shake is a cold drink made by mixing milk with fruit or ice cream.
items.example_en: They bought a strawberry shake at the café.

items.definition_en: Iced tea is cold tea often served with ice.
items.example_en: She likes to drink iced tea in summer.

items.definition_en: Herbal tea is a hot drink made from herbs instead of tea leaves.
items.example_en: Many people drink herbal tea to relax.

items.definition_en: Mineral water is water that contains natural minerals.
items.example_en: The waiter served us mineral water with our meal.
